name: Schuck School Bus Svc LLC
recent_news: Long-standing 71-year family operation; operates via Schuck School Bus Service LLC and Schuck Charters & Tours LLC at 1620 29th Ave S, Moorhead.
fit_notes: Long-tenured single-operator family business in MN/ND border region; small fleet but 70+ years suggests potential succession/exit window. Charter + school mix typical Summit tuck-in profile.

name: Schmitz Bus Line
principals: Tracy L. Schmitz (CEO/owner); Schmitz family (Paul Schmitz historically)
districts_or_customers: Caledonia Area Public Schools ISD 299 (two-year contract); historically also Spring Grove School District
recent_news: Schmitz Bus Service Inc holds the active student transportation contract for Caledonia Area Public Schools; contact schmitzbuscal@gmail.com (Tracy Schmitz).
fit_notes: Small rural single-district family contractor in SE MN. Limited scale (~25 employees) but locked-in district contract; potential roll-up candidate at modest valuation.

name: Z Transportation
districts_or_customers: Perham-Dent Public Schools (multi-year transportation contract awarded 2019)
recent_news: Founded July 2017 to serve Perham-Dent School District; secured four-year contract starting 2019-20 with front-loaded fleet upgrade investment.
fit_notes: Young (2017) single-district family operator in west-central MN; Zitzow family ties run deep. Smaller fleet, limited scale; may be too small/recent for Summit unless bundled with regional adjacent operators. Note ztransportation.com is unrelated freight co.

name: Faribault Transportation Co
owner_or_parent: Minnesota Coaches (Regan family) / Tiger Infrastructure Partners (Fund IV)
principals: Pat Regan (CEO, Minnesota Coaches); Patrick O. Regan
districts_or_customers: Faribault Public Schools and surrounding districts; general and SPED transportation plus charter
recent_news: Dec 2024: Tiger Infrastructure Partners (Fund IV) announced growth capital investment into Minnesota Coaches platform; STB acquisition-of-control filings (Nov 2024 Patrick O. Regan; Jan 2025 Tiger/TIP MN Investments) cover Faribault Transportation Service, Minnesota Coaches, Marschall Line, Rehbein Transit, Ready Bus, Voyageur Bus, Minn-Dakota Coaches.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. Part of the Minnesota Coaches platform (1,000+ buses, 36 districts, 1,350 employees) now backed by Tiger Infrastructure Partners (Dec 2024). Tiger is a direct PE competitor pursuing similar Midwest STB roll-up; off-limits.

name: Metro Bus Svc Inc
owner_or_parent: Minnesota Coaches (Regan family) / Tiger Infrastructure Partners (Fund IV)
principals: Regan family (Pat Regan, CEO of MN Coaches platform)
districts_or_customers: Holding/operating company at the Minnesota Coaches Hastings HQ (101 10th St E Ste 300); per STB filings, Metro Bus Service Inc is the parent of Voyageur Bus (Duluth, MN)
recent_news: Identified in 2024-2025 STB Federal Register filings as a Minnesota Coaches-affiliated entity at 101 10th St E, Hastings; included in the Tiger Infrastructure Partners Fund IV acquisition-of-control of the broader Minnesota Coaches family of carriers (Dec 2024 / Jan 2025).
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. Metro Bus Service Inc is an internal Minnesota Coaches holding entity (same Hastings address as Faribault Transportation/MN Coaches HQ); rolled up under Tiger Infrastructure Partners. Off-limits; same parent as rank 866.
